title: heterotheca villosa var. foliosa
intro: Heterotheca villosa var. foliosa, also known as the hairy false goldeneye, is a perennial plant belonging to the Asteraceae family. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for treating fever, cough, and respiratory issues, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant's leaves and flowers have been used to make herbal preparations, such as teas and infusions, which can provide various health benefits, including reducing inflammation and improving respiratory function. In traditional medicine, heterotheca villosa var. foliosa is often used to treat conditions like bronchitis and asthma, and its herbal preparations are believed to promote overall well-being and immune system function.
